title: Connect your Strava data
subtitle: Browse your full activity history — offline, private, forever

steps.heading: How to import your data
steps.step4: Wait for the email from Strava (can take a few hours)
steps.step5: Download the ZIP archive to your device

legal: Your data never leaves your device. This app has no server and no analytics. Not affiliated with Strava.

eviction.noZip: Your data was cleared by iOS. Import your ZIP to restore it.
